title: Error at ICE40_DSP pass: coAssert `nusers(O.extract_end(i)) <= 1' failed in ./passes/pmgen/ice40_dsp_pm.h:388.

features.name: SB_MAC16 dual 8x8 multiplier configuration
features.description: Code should include an SB_MAC16 instantiation configured via defparam for dual 8x8 unsigned multiplication with TOPOUTPUT_SELECT=2 and BOTOUTPUT_SELECT=2

features.name: input concatenation for MAC16 bus formation
features.description: Code should include concatenation of two 8-bit inputs into a 16-bit bus used as SB_MAC16 A or B port

features.name: output part-selection to split MAC32 result
features.description: Code should include part-selection of a 32-bit wire to extract two 16-bit multiplication results from SB_MAC16

features.name: syn_hier hard attribute on module instantiating DSP
features.description: Code should include a module with synthesis syn_hier attribute set to hard that instantiates a DSP primitive
